MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES STREET-GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#3 CHAITIN, REPTR SAUCEDA--CC FOR COURT TRIAL ALL PRESENT. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR POSS PLUS RENT AND DAMAGES AT RATE OF $11.20 PER DAY FROM 4-8-93. PLTF ATTY IS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHINN, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 417 GOUGH STREET, #401 AND #402, SF, CA $313.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $313.60, LEASE FORFEITED
